title: Beta Enderman
description: A mod that adds a close replica of the PAX 2011 V1.8 Enderman!
body:
This mod adds the enderman from PAX 2011 V1.8, it doesn't quite drop diamonds but it does take damage from projectiles!

The enderman has green eyes, black particles and can spawn in:
1. The end.
2. The overworld.

It behaves the exact same as the regular enderman just like in the 2011 version!
